tasks.title: Write or refine the project objective in the PRD file
tasks.notes: The prompt generator reads the PRD file directly.

tasks.title: Replace this seed task list with repo-specific work
tasks.notes: Keep statuses current so fresh Codex runs can resume deterministically.

tasks.title: Detect nested project roots so Ralph can inspect the starter extension from the repo root
tasks.notes: Workspace scanning now selects the nested `ralph-codex-vscode-starter` project root when the repo root has no shallow markers, and the runtime build was refreshed so the extension uses the updated scan path.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for nested workspace scanning and prompt repo-context rendering
tasks.notes: Locked in nested root-selection evidence plus prompt repo-context rendering for inspected-root versus workspace-root cases.

tasks.title: Cover clipboard and IDE handoff strategies with automated tests and explicit docs
tasks.notes: Added command-shell smoke coverage for prompt clipboard auto-copy plus Open Codex IDE clipboard-only, IDE-command, missing-command fallback, and cliExec-warning handoff paths, and documented the operator-facing handoff rules and remaining live-host gaps.

tasks.title: Prove the packaging path and document the manual `.vsix` install workflow
tasks.notes: Documented the operator-facing `npm run package` plus manual `.vsix` install workflow, hardened the package script for this repo by using `vsce package --no-dependencies`, added repository metadata plus README links that `vsce` can rewrite, and validated a fresh `ralph-codex-workbench-0.1.0.vsix` build. Packaging still warns about a missing LICENSE file and the lack of `.vscodeignore` or a `files` allowlist.

tasks.title: Exercise a real CLI iteration against a temp workspace and tighten any artifact or verifier gaps it exposes
tasks.notes: Added an optional `npm run test:real-cli-smoke` temp-workspace runner that drives the actual `codex exec` path, documented its operator use and environment limits, and surfaced summarized execution failure messages into the structured iteration/latest-result/status artifacts. A real smoke run in this sandbox exercised the path and preserved a temp workspace with the expected backend-connect failure evidence.

tasks.title: Align nested inspection-root and execution-root semantics across prompting, execution, and verification
tasks.notes: Ralph now persists explicit workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, and provenance bundles. `codex exec` plus validation/git verifiers run from the selected inspection root while `.ralph` stays anchored at the workspace root, and `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` now provides a deterministic manual override for ambiguous umbrella workspaces with evidence, status, docs, and regression coverage.

tasks.title: Persist chosen inspection root in prompt evidence, execution plans, provenance bundles, and status surfaces
tasks.notes: Added explicit root-policy persistence covering workspace, inspection, execution, and verification roots in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, provenance bundles, and status summaries.

tasks.title: Define deterministic execution-root and verifier-root policy for nested repos
tasks.notes: Locked in a simple policy: execution root and verifier root follow the selected inspection root; workspace root continues to own `.ralph` control-plane state and artifacts.

tasks.title: Implement CLI and verifier root-alignment using the chosen root policy
tasks.notes: CLI execution now passes the selected execution root into `codex exec --cd`, and validation/git verifiers run from the selected verification root instead of depending on manual `cd ... && ...` command composition.

tasks.title: Add an explicit inspection-root override for ambiguous umbrella or multi-repo workspaces
tasks.notes: Added the `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` setting, validated it against the workspace boundary, let it override shallow root scoring when valid, and surfaced applied/invalid override state in workspace-scan evidence and status output.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for nested execution-root, verifier-root, and override behavior
tasks.notes: Regression coverage now includes applied and invalid inspection-root override scanning, status rendering for override state, nested execution-root and verifier-root persistence, and an end-to-end CLI iteration proving override-driven execution/verifier cwd selection.

tasks.title: Document workspace-root, inspection-root, execution-root, and verifier-root behavior
tasks.notes: Updated README plus architecture, provenance, and verifier docs so nested-root execution semantics, the workspace-root `.ralph` boundary, and the `inspectionRootOverride` escape hatch are explicit.

tasks.title: Defer broad multi-agent orchestration until nested root semantics are deterministic and evidence-backed
tasks.notes: Locked the current product boundary to a sequential single-agent loop, documented that broader multi-agent orchestration remains deferred until nested workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy is deterministic, test-backed, and evidence-backed, and added docs-validation coverage so that guardrail stays explicit.

tasks.title: Add an explicit inspection-root override for ambiguous umbrella or multi-repo workspaces
tasks.notes: Satisfied by the `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` implementation completed under T8.4; retained here only as the previously-recorded duplicate follow-on item.
